predecessor_gate1.legacy_z_collapsed_definition: layer-harmonic kz plus half-control-volume face distance

allowed_work: read frozen P5 arrays and metadata
derive deterministic scalar proxies and train-only scalar calibrations
write final-correction CSV, JSON, Markdown, and fixture artifacts
prohibited_work: modify model, loss, training configuration, split, label, or P5 data
train or evaluate a learned model
write data/, output/, checkpoints/, or logs/

operator_1d_definition.name: z_collapsed_1d_operator
operator_1d_definition.face_conductance: for each adjacent z pair, sum over x-y columns harmonic_mean(kz_lower,kz_upper) * dx_cv * dy_cv / (z_upper-z_lower)
operator_1d_definition.source_policy: sum q*CV for iz>=1 only; bottom q is excluded by the same bottom-row replacement as the V4 operator
operator_1d_definition.top_robin: sum h*dx_cv*dy_cv over top nodes and add h*A*(T_inf-T_bottom) to the relative RHS

calibration_and_selection.test_role_policy: report_only_after_selection; never used to fit or select
calibration_and_selection.selection: minimum valid_iid log_RMSE among physical candidates
calibration_and_selection.tie_break: only if winner-runner-up CI includes zero and corrected z_collapsed_1d_operator is statistically tied with winner; prefer exact operator face semantics and nonuniform-grid generalizability
